articles.title: The Reality Of Xbox’s Plans For ‘Fallout,’ ‘Elder Scrolls,’ ‘Halo’ And More - Forbes
articles.description: Xbox will get a new Fallout game earlier than expected, but for this and other series, the reality of the future remains somewhat stark.

articles.title: Say hello to Claude Wrapped - The Verge
articles.description: Anthropic announced a “reflect” feature for Claude, akin to Claude Wrapped, allowing users to see an analysis of their usage data over months or a year.

articles.title: Samsung shares first official glimpse at wide Galaxy Z Fold 8, with Spider-Man’s help - 9to5Google
articles.description: Samsung has dropped a new Galaxy Z Fold 8 teaser, offering a quick glimpse of the wider new form factor...

articles.title: Ubisoft Barcelona Celebrates Successful Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Launch With Layoffs - Insider Gaming
articles.description: 51 Employee's, many of whom worked on Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced will celebrate its launch with being laid off.

articles.title: Sony, Bungie settle with ex-Marathon director they accused of "predatory behaviour", bringing $200m wrongful dismissal lawsuit to a close - Eurogamer.net
articles.description: Former Marathon director Christopher Barrett departed Bungie in 2024, but filed a lawsuit after reports of inappropriate behaviour emerged.

articles.title: T-Mobile faces backlash over new customer support restriction - thestreet.com
articles.description: T-Mobile customers have discovered a new limitation when contacting customer support for help.
